response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and agentic workflows via MCP, aligning with key requirements; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders, which are critical for the staff-level role.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js experience across cloud and AI-agent infrastructure
Proven track record in building scalable systems on AWS and Kubernetes
Active contributor to open-source AI/ML tooling (e.g., MCP frameworks, GISCollective)
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
